text: The CNC machining centre HAAS VF-4SS (serial number 1234567, asset ID: MFG-VF4SS-007) at production cell PC-03 is classified as a manufacturing asset under RAMI 4.0. It was commissioned on 2021-06-15, has a design life of 20 years, and its Asset Administration Shell ID is urn:aas:plant-alpha:VF4SS-007.

Conveyor belt assembly CBU-12 (asset ID: CONV-CBU-012, AAS ID: urn:aas:plant-beta:CBU-012) transports automotive body panels between welding station W-04 and paint shop entry PE-01. Rated belt speed: 0.4 m/s. Motor: 7.5 kW ABB M3AA 160MA 4-pole.

The industrial robot arm KUKA KR 210 R3100 (serial: KR210-0234, AAS ID: urn:aas:plant-alpha:KR210-0234) installed at spot-welding cell SW-07 has a maximum payload of 210 kg, reach of 3100 mm, and is integrated with the plant's MES via OPC-UA endpoint opc.tcp://10.0.5.12:4840.

extractions.text: industrial robot arm KUKA KR 210 R3100

text: Air compressor station ACS-02 (asset ID: UTIL-ACS-002, plant: Hamburg Facility 1) comprises three Atlas Copco GA 132 VSD+ compressors providing compressed air at 8.5 bar to the production floor. The asset is managed under ISO 55001 maintenance programme ref. MP-ACS-002.

The PLC cabinet controlling automated guided vehicle AGV-Fleet-01 (asset ID: AGV-CTRL-001, AAS ID: urn:aas:plant-gamma:AGV-CTRL-001) uses a Siemens S7-1500 CPU 1516-3 PN/DP, firmware v2.9.2, and manages a fleet of 6 AGVs via PROFINET IO.

extractions.text: PLC cabinet controlling automated guided vehicle AGV-Fleet-01
